word: H4662 - מִפְקָד - miphqâd - mif-kawd' - Appointed place

sections.paragraph:
Original: מפקד

Transliteration: miphqâd

Phonetic: mif-kawd'

BDB Definition:

  1. muster, appointment, appointed place
    1. muster (of people)
    2. appointment
    3. appointed place
  2. (TWOT) number

Origin: from H6485

TWOT entry: 1802g

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
